description_1: The charm of Tangier, combined with the excellence of hotel service. LA TERAL offers an exclusive collection of high-end apartments, blending the independence of a private residence with the refinement of the most prestigious hotel services.
description_2: LA TERAL provides a unique experience, enhanced by a spectacular panoramic view between sea and mountains. Ideally located, the residence enjoys immediate proximity to the famous Malabata Beach and Villa Harris Park, while being just steps away from the city's best restaurants and shopping centers. Whether your stay is for business or a family vacation, enjoy an exceptional setting designed for excellence and absolute serenity.
